name: Code Fragment
description: A shard of recovered world-code. Common crafting and upgrade material.

name: Old Battery Pack
description: A salvaged cell. Restores a moderate amount of Code Energy.

name: Iron CPU
description: A rugged processing unit scavenged from a downed machine.

name: Scrap Plating
description: Battered armor plating torn from rail-fused machinery.

name: Core Shard
description: A sliver of an AI core, still faintly humming.

name: Abyss Scale
description: A scale of digital data, cold and impossibly heavy.

name: Choir Relic
description: A relic resonating with seven merged voices.

name: Atlas Core
description: The forbidden AI core ATLAS. A story-critical artifact.

name: Code Crown
description: A crown of sovereign code, mark of an AI ruler.

name: Emperor Cipher
description: An encryption key to the deepest fortress vaults.

name: Fragment of Hope
description: The last spark of human hope, crystallized into code.

name: Repair Kit
description: Restores a moderate amount of HP to one ally.

name: Energy Cell
description: Restores Code Energy to one ally.

name: Code Blade
description: Saka's energy sword, forged from condensed world-code.

name: Code Staff
description: Kara's ancient staff that channels code-energy spells.

name: Code Hammer
description: Zell's massive mechanical hammer, built for breaking machines.

name: Pulse Saber
description: A humming blade that overclocks Saka's strikes.

name: Oracle Rod
description: A focusing rod that magnifies Kara's code-spells.

name: Siege Maul
description: A monstrous maul Zell swings to shatter cores.

name: Scrap Vest
description: Light salvaged plating. Modest protection.

name: Alloy Mail
description: Layered alloy mail that turns blades and bolts alike.

name: Aegis Core
description: A reactive core-weave that hardens against any assault.

name: Power Chip
description: Boosts offensive subroutines — raises ATK and MAG.

name: Guard Chip
description: Hardens defensive subroutines — raises DEF and RES.

name: Swift Chip
description: Overclocks reflexes — sharply raises SPD.

name: Vitae Chip
description: A life-sustaining loop — greatly raises max HP.
